recommendations.title: Full of It
recommendations.overview: A teenager tells outrageous lies at his new high school, only to have them suddenly come true.

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island
recommendations.overview: An eccentric lottery winner who lives alone on a remote island tries to make his fantasies come true by getting his favourite musicians to perform at his home.

recommendations.title: One Man and his Cow
recommendations.overview: An Algerian man's life-long dream finally comes true when he receives an invitation to take his cow Jacqueline to the Paris International Agriculture Fair.

recommendations.title: Wandering Stars
recommendations.overview: This film follows the making of Nekfeu's 3rd album, between Paris, Japan, Greece and the United States.

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
recommendations.overview: France, 17th century, under the reign of Louis XIII. Dogtanian is an impetuous and innocent peasant from Gascony, as well as a skilled swordsman, who travels to Paris with the purpose of making his dream come true: to join the Corps of Muskehounds of

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Música
recommendations.overview: A young man, plagued by the music in his head, has to come to terms with an uncertain future while balancing love, family and Brazilian culture in Newark, New Jersey.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Life
recommendations.overview: When a young fisherman with a hidden talent gets discovered by a music producer, he must decide if he's ready to open himself up to stardom — and love.

recommendations.title: Invincible
